---

Setup Google account (if you don’t have one)
Create YouTube channel and choose a name
ACCOUNT SETUP
Layout tab
• Create/choose your channel trailer video (can be later)
• Choose video as your featured video (can be later)
• Create and move sections (can be later after playlists)
Branding tab
• Add your profile photo (photo or logo)
• Add you channel banner image
• Add a watermark image (subscribe)
Basic Info tab
• Write your channel description (with keywords)
• Add website links (site, funnels, social media, etc)
• Add your contact info (optional, recommended)
CUSTOMIZATION SECTION
You’re ready… start creating videos!

CHANNEL SETUP CHECKLIST
Channel tab
• Add channel keywords (include all relevant phrases)
• Review and edit various advanced settings as desired
• Complete phone verification to unlock feature eligibility
Upload default tab
• Set up upload defaults, especially description with links
• Choose a category in upload advanced settings
• Review all other settings tabs and adjust as desired
SETTINGS SECTION
Generate subscription popup link (see manual tips)
Create themed playlists as you add more videos
Choose custom channel URL (100 or more subs)
Apply for monetization (100 subs and 4000 hours)
Once monetized, add links to video end screens
ADDITIONAL SETUP
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
